title: The World Moves On
writer: Doris Anderson, Reginald Berkeley, William M. Conselman
actors: Madeleine Carroll, Franchot Tone, Reginald Denny
plot: Richard Girard is part of a New Orleans family working closely with the English Warburtons. When Richard meets Mary Warburton she is engaged to Erik von Gerardt. He does wed Mary but their time in America is financially difficult.
